title: MCC Island for Lunar Client
description: Tailor-made list of popular mods to enhance your gameplay experience on MCC Island through Lunar Client.
body:
![Lunar Client x MCC Island](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/4973f080bf-lunar-x-mcc-island.png) # MCC Island for Lunar Client **MCC Island for Lunar Client** is a tailor-made list of popular mods to enhance your gameplay experience on MCC Island. These mods are validated to work with Lunar Client. _Note: We recommend using [**Lunar Client**](https://lunarclient.com/download) to gain the best experience while using this modpack, however it can be launched on any modpack loader._ ## Modpack Content * **Noxesium**: Improves client performance and experience on large multiplayer servers. * **Island Utils**: Adds enhancements to your MCCI experience. * **Lithium**: General purpose optimization mod, improves game and server logic. * **Sodium**: Modern rendering engine which greatly improves performance. * **Iris**: Modern shaders mod for Minecraft, compatible with OptiFine shader packs. * **Fabric API**: Adds common hooks and intercompatibility measures. * **FerriteCore**: Provide memory usage optimizations. * **Cloth Config API**: Configuration library for Minecraft Mods. * **Mod Menu**: Adds a mod menu to view an in-game list of all the mods you have installed. * **More Culling**: Prevents the rendering of things you cannot see to improve FPS. * **Nvidium**: Adds additional optimizations for Minecraft users who have a NVIDIA GPU. * **YetAnotherConfigLib**: A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft. ## FAQ
How do I install the MCC Island modpack on Lunar Client?
Here are the five easy steps you need to take!
### Step 1: Download Lunar Client [![Lunar Client Download Grid](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/edcac7cc5f-lunar-client-download-grid.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/download) ### Step 2: Select "Versions" on the Lunar Client Launcher [![Lunar Client Launcher](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/bbe073a641-launcher-versions-tab.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 3: Click "Modpacks" on the top of the page [![Lunar Client Modpacks](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/13915e6116-lunarclient-modpacks-page.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 4: Install your modpack of choosing, in this case the MCC Island for Lunar Client Modpack. [![Lunar Client Modpack Installer](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/b880040165-launcher-install-play.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 5: Click "Launch Game" after the install is complete! [![Lunar Client Launch Button](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/42725ba855-launcher-mods-page.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client)
What is MCC Island and how do I play? MCC Island (also known as MCCI) is a free to play public Minecraft server that allows everyone that follows [MC Championship](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/lunar-client-x-mcc-island#section-What_is_MC_Championship) to enjoy their favorite game modes from the event. MCCI and MC Championship were both created and are currently owned by [Noxcrew](https://noxcrew.com/). MCCI features an assortment of gamemodes, such as; Hole in the Wall, Battle Box, Sky Battle, Parkour Warrior Dojo, and To Get to the Other Side. For in-depth summaries of each gamemode visit our [blog post](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/lunar-client-x-mcc-island#section-Game_modes). Alongside all these gamemodes, you'll find a fully customized experience. Ready to play? Connect to MCC Island today using: [play.mccisland.net](https://mccisland.net)

Connect with fellow MCC Island enthusiast and stay in the loop with latest updates in our [Discord](https://lunarclient.com/discord).
